label: PIO: Build
command: [ -x "$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin/pio" ] || (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" venv --python 3.13 ~/.platformio/penv && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" pip install --python ~/.platformio/penv pioarduino); PATH="$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin:$PATH"; ENV_NAME=$ZED_CUSTOM_env_name; pio run ${ENV_NAME:+-e} ${ENV_NAME#env:}

label: PIO: Update compiledb for clangd
command: [ -x "$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin/pio" ] || (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" venv --python 3.13 ~/.platformio/penv && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" pip install --python ~/.platformio/penv pioarduino); PATH="$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin:$PATH"; ENV_NAME=$ZED_CUSTOM_env_name; pio run --target compiledb ${ENV_NAME:+-e} ${ENV_NAME#env:}

label: PIO: Upload
command: [ -x "$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin/pio" ] || (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" venv --python 3.13 ~/.platformio/penv && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" pip install --python ~/.platformio/penv pioarduino); PATH="$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin:$PATH"; ENV_NAME=$ZED_CUSTOM_env_name; pio run --target upload ${ENV_NAME:+-e} ${ENV_NAME#env:}

label: PIO: Monitor
command: [ -x "$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin/pio" ] || (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" venv --python 3.13 ~/.platformio/penv && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" pip install --python ~/.platformio/penv pioarduino); PATH="$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin:$PATH"; ENV_NAME=$ZED_CUSTOM_env_name; pio pkg install ${ENV_NAME:+-e} ${ENV_NAME#env:} && pio device monitor

label: PIO: Clean
command: [ -x "$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin/pio" ] || (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" venv --python 3.13 ~/.platformio/penv && "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" pip install --python ~/.platformio/penv pioarduino); PATH="$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin:$PATH"; ENV_NAME=$ZED_CUSTOM_env_name; pio run --target clean ${ENV_NAME:+-e} ${ENV_NAME#env:}
